title: Sheri Buretta Receives ATHENA Leadership Award
summary: Chugach recently celebrated its 50 th anniversary, and Sheri has served on its Board of Directors for half of those five decades helping to guide Chugach through significant growth. Sheri’s professional career extends beyond her leadership position with Chugach. She is an active community member, serving on the board of Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) for 25 years; Native American Contractor’s Association; Silver Salmon Creek Leadership Institute; Russian Orthodox...
